summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WhatsApp Business automation SaaS app. All major features working correctly including dark theme landing page, authentication flow, onboarding process, and dashboard protection.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero 'See How It Works' button has overlay interception preventing clicks
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - button is functional but may timeout on click due to overlay

passed_tests: Landing page loads with proper dark theme (#25D366 green accents)
Hero section displays phone mockup and animated stats counters
Navigation bar with 'Start Free' and 'Log in' buttons working correctly
All landing page sections present: Hero, How It Works, Features, Pricing (3 plans), Footer
Login page loads with email/password form and toggle between login/signup modes
Login form validation working (empty fields, wrong credentials show proper errors)
Onboarding page loads with 4-step process (Account, Business, Products, Settings)
Onboarding step 1 validation working (required fields, password mismatch)
Progress bar with 4 step indicators displaying correctly
Dashboard protection working (redirects unauthenticated users to /login)
Mobile responsiveness implemented with mobile navigation menu
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Dark theme consistency maintained across all pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor overlay interception issue with hero secondary button to ensure smooth clicking experience. Consider reviewing z-index layering in hero section.
